'''√sh-h-ng''' ('''shahanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zao|zao]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zao|zao]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| shahanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shahangithi|shahangithi]] || [[word:shahangiji|shahangiji]] || [[word:shahangishi|shahangishi]] || [[word:shahangi|shahangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahanguthuth|shahanguthuth]] || [[word:shahangujuj|shahangujuj]] || [[word:shahangushush|shahangushush]] || [[word:shahang|shahang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahanguthu|shahanguthu]] || [[word:shahanguju|shahanguju]] || [[word:shahangushu|shahangushu]] || [[word:shahangu|shahangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahangufuth|shahangufuth]] || [[word:shahangufuj|shahangufuj]] || [[word:shahangufush|shahangufush]] || [[word:shahanguf|shahanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shahangethe|shahangethe]] || [[word:shahangeje|shahangeje]] || [[word:shahangeshe|shahangeshe]] || [[word:shahange|shahange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahangothoth|shahangothoth]] || [[word:shahangojoj|shahangojoj]] || [[word:shahangoshosh|shahangoshosh]] || [[word:shahang|shahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahangotho|shahangotho]] || [[word:shahangojo|shahangojo]] || [[word:shahangosho|shahangosho]] || [[word:shahango|shahango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahangofoth|shahangofoth]] || [[word:shahangofoj|shahangofoj]] || [[word:shahangofosh|shahangofosh]] || [[word:shahangof|shahangof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahangïfïf|shahangïfïf]] || [[word:shahangïfïf|shahangïfïf]] || [[word:shahangïfïf|shahangïfïf]] || [[word:shahangïfïf|shahangïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]] || [[word:shahangïf|shahangïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shahangæthæ|shahangæthæ]] || [[word:shahangæjæ|shahangæjæ]] || [[word:shahangæshæ|shahangæshæ]] || [[word:shahangæ|shahangæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahangathath|shahangathath]] || [[word:shahangajaj|shahangajaj]] || [[word:shahangashash|shahangashash]] || [[word:shahang|shahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahangatha|shahangatha]] || [[word:shahangaja|shahangaja]] || [[word:shahangasha|shahangasha]] || [[word:shahanga|shahanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahangafath|shahangafath]] || [[word:shahangafaj|shahangafaj]] || [[word:shahangafash|shahangafash]] || [[word:shahangaf|shahangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shahangasha|shahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahangasha|goshahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahangasha|gokishahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shahangnüsha|shahangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahangnknüsha|goshahangnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangnüsha|gokishahangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahangshësha|shahangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahangnkshësha|goshahangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahangshësha|gokishahangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangrosha|shahangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangnkrosha|goshahangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangrosha|gokishahangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangmusha|shahangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangnkmusha|goshahangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangmusha|gokishahangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahangsherasha|shahangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahangnksherasha|goshahangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahangsherasha|gokishahangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahangngasha|shahangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahangnkngasha|goshahangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahangngasha|gokishahangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahangyasha|shahangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahangnkyasha|goshahangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahangyasha|gokishahangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahangyamasha|shahangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahangnkyamasha|goshahangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahangyamasha|gokishahangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangnüshësha|shahangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangnknüshësha|goshahangnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangnüshësha|gokishahangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangnürosha|shahangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangnknürosha|goshahangnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangnürosha|gokishahangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangnümusha|shahangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangnknümusha|goshahangnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangnümusha|gokishahangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangshënüsha|shahangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangnkshënüsha|goshahangnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangshënüsha|gokishahangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangshërosha|shahangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangnkshërosha|goshahangnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangshërosha|gokishahangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangshëmusha|shahangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangnkshëmusha|goshahangnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangshëmusha|gokishahangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangronüsha|shahangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangnkronüsha|goshahangnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangronüsha|gokishahangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangroshësha|shahangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangnkroshësha|goshahangnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangroshësha|gokishahangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahangromusha|shahangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahangnkromusha|goshahangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahangromusha|gokishahangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahangmunüsha|shahangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahangnkmunüsha|goshahangnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahangmunüsha|gokishahangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahangmushësha|shahangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahangnkmushësha|goshahangnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahangmushësha|gokishahangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahangmurosha|shahangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahangnkmurosha|goshahangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahangmurosha|gokishahangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shahang|shahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:shæhæng|shæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshahang|hoshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoshæhæng|hoshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshahang|hohoshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshæhæng|hohoshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüshahang|nüshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüshæhæng|nüshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshahang|nünüshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshæhæng|nünüshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïshahang|nïshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïshæhæng|nïshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshahang|nïnïshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshæhæng|nïnïshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushahang|lushahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lushæhæng|lushæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushahang|lulushahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushæhæng|lulushæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishahang|lishahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lishæhæng|lishæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishahang|lilishahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishæhæng|lilishæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshahang|koshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koshæhæng|koshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshahang|kokoshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshæhæng|kokoshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshahang|keshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keshæhæng|keshæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshahang|kekeshahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshæhæng|kekeshæhæng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
